name: My claim for hearing loss from machinery was denied. What are my next steps in Utah?

mainEntity.name: My claim for hearing loss from machinery was denied. What are my next steps in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Labor Commission within 30 days, gather medical proof.[8]
acceptedAnswer.description: File a Notice of Appeal with Utah Labor Commission within 30 days of denial.[8] Request a hearing for review.[8] Key factors: (1) Prove AOE/COE and medical causation; (2) Broad coverage presumption; (3) Employer must disprove.[1][8] Gather medical records, witness statements; consider attorney for hearing prep.[8] Appeals can go to Court of Appeals if needed.[8]

description: Appeal to Labor Commission within 30 days, gather medical proof.[8]
